title: Mossy Crafting Recipes
description: lets you craft mossy versions of slabs and stairs directly
body:
## Have you ever accidentally crafted stairs but then realized you needed the mossy version?

It could be frustrating to find out that you **can't** _actually_ craft the mossy versions using Stairs of Slabs directly.

Well, this datapack fixes that. It adds crafting recipes to directly craft stairs and slabs into the mossy variants either with moss or vines.

![Crafting mossy cobblestone stairs in the crafting grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b226b509060873581819c4feba777c01533a1e1a.png)
![Crafting mossy stone brick slab in the crafting grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee6df4290711f94aac349b0b5948cca05a43a8be.png)

**Happy Crafting ;P**
